note: seat read Graphiti from GitHub (external/ gitignored, hidden from opencode search); line numbers approximate

claim: EntityEdge carries valid_at/invalid_at (event-time) + expired_at (txn-time invalidity recorded) + created_at (txn-time) + reference_time (episode anchor) — a 5th timestamp beyond aionforge's 4, separating when-system-learned-fact-ended from when-fact-actually-ended.

LLM finds contradicting edges on extraction; resolve_edge_contradictions() closes old edges with invalid_at=new.valid_at (event-time) + expired_at=now() (txn-time), never deleting. Contribution: LLM-based contradiction discovery + event-time close vs internal invalid_at=now().
EpisodicNode is the ingestion unit; MENTIONS edges link episode->entity; EntityEdge.episodes tracks producing episodes; provenance flows episode.reference_time -> edge.reference_time.
novelty: EXTENDS aionforge (episode-as-node, not just diversity key)

claim: fulltext + vector RRF + BFS-from-seed (depth<=3) + MMR(0.5). Internal is a superset (5-channel RRF + convergence bonus + GRAPH_WEIGHT_BOOST); Graphiti's 3-channel is a strict subset.

EntityEdge has a fact_embedding over the fact text enabling semantic edge dedup + similarity edge retrieval at write. Internal causal_edges has no embedding column; edges are traversed structurally; dedup is on memory content not edge facts.
retrieve_episodes() fetches last N episodes (default 3) before reference_time as previous_episodes context for extraction prompts (ingestion-time window, vs aionforge recall-time diversity cap).
maps_to: C4-C + C7-A (different lifecycle phase: write vs read)
